# Thermogravimetric Analysis

**Summary**: An analytical technique to study the thermal stability and composition of materials.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] used TGA to assess the effect of temperature rise over time on guar gum samples.
